steps.observed: Footer newsletter form present with email input and Sign Up button

steps.action: Click Sign Up with empty email
steps.observed: Red error text 'Please enter a valid email address' displayed

steps.action: Fill email 'testuser@example.com' and click Sign Up
steps.observed: Green success text 'Thank you for signing up!' displayed

steps.action: Scroll to footer, check newsletter form presence
steps.expected: Newsletter form present on about page footer
steps.observed: Newsletter form with email input and Sign Up button present

steps.expected: Success message shown on second page
steps.observed: Green success text 'Thank you for signing up!' displayed on about page
Catering Inquiry page loaded with full form

steps.action: Set Budget Range via JS eval to '$5K-$10K'
Set Event Type via JS eval to 'Sit-Down Dinner Party'
Set Service Type via JS eval to 'Buffet'

steps.observed: Page shows 'Thank You for Your Inquiry' with checkmark icon and message about 24-48 hour follow-up

frictions.description: Native HTML <select> dropdowns required JavaScript eval to set values reliably, as documented in the task instructions
frictions.resolution: Used JavaScript eval to set select values and dispatch change events

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-CROSS-005: Newsletter signup form is present in footer on both homepage and about page, validates empty email (shows error), and accepts valid email (shows success). VAL-CROSS-007: Catering inquiry form accepts all required fields and shows a clear 'Thank You for Your Inquiry' confirmation page after submission.
